buddy_character_placements.gap: All buddy images have white backgrounds — Imagen 4 does not support transparent PNG output. Images placed on white or contrasting backgrounds work well; dark-background placements need CSS mix-blend-mode or manual background removal.

starbursts_shapes.wavy_divider: 2 SVG wave paths on index.html (hero→featured, featured→picks) using different wave curves
starbursts_shapes.diagonal_stripes: deals.html main content area has repeating-linear-gradient diagonal stripe at 5% opacity
starbursts_shapes.gap: No Studio UI for inserting starburst or wavy-divider components — must be done via CLI/direct code

display_divs.gap: Display Stage is a custom pattern — not a Studio component. No drag-and-drop or template insertion. Must be built via CLI. The data-stage-slot attribute is present for future Studio slot detection.

results.change: New deals every week! → New treasures every weekend!
Browse This Week's Items → → Shop This Weekend's Deals →

brainstorm_mode.gap: Not yet tested — requires Studio server restart to clear stuck buildInProgress lock

famtastic_effect.notes: Site passes all FAMtastic visual requirements: 3+ starbursts above fold on hero, Buddy in 5+ placements, wavy SVG divider, diagonal stripe on deals page, product cards break boundary with Buddy badge, no section looks like a template. Bold color palette consistent across all pages. Bangers + Nunito + Permanent Marker font combination landing correctly.
famtastic_effect.gap: Buddy images have white backgrounds — background-removal pass needed for optimal placement on colored sections

cli_handoffs.reason: Studio buildInProgress flag stuck after first 'Build From Brief' click — no cancel mechanism exists
cli_handoffs.action: Wrote all 5 HTML pages directly to dist/ via Claude Code CLI
cli_handoffs.suggested_fix: Add cancel-build button to Studio UI that calls /api/cancel-build endpoint, which clears the in-memory buildInProgress flag and terminates the active Claude stream

cli_handoffs.reason: No Studio UI for injecting external CDN libraries
cli_handoffs.action: Added Swiper.js CDN links and initialization script directly to index.html
cli_handoffs.suggested_fix: Studio should have a 'CDN Library' panel in Settings tab where user can add CDN URLs and Studio auto-injects them into all relevant pages

cli_handoffs.reason: No Studio UI for inserting starburst shapes, wavy dividers, or decorative patterns
cli_handoffs.action: Implemented all shape patterns directly in HTML/CSS
cli_handoffs.suggested_fix: Studio Design tab should include insertable 'Shape' components: starburst (configurable size/color/text), wavy-divider (configurable fill/wave-direction), diagonal-stripe (configurable color/angle/opacity)

cli_handoffs.reason: Display Stage is a custom component pattern not available as a Studio insertable
cli_handoffs.action: Hand-coded the display stage in HTML/CSS with data-stage-slot attribute
cli_handoffs.suggested_fix: Studio should support importing components from the components/ library into active pages via a 'Insert Component' action in the chat or canvas

new_gaps_discovered.title: No cancel mechanism for stuck build
new_gaps_discovered.description: buildInProgress flag is in-memory only. If a build starts and the WS connection drops or Claude errors mid-stream, the flag is permanently stuck until server restart. No cancel-build API endpoint exists. No timeout on builds.
new_gaps_discovered.suggested_fix: Add /api/cancel-build POST endpoint that clears buildInProgress flag. Add 'Cancel Build' button to Studio UI that appears when a build is running. Add 5-minute timeout on build operations.

new_gaps_discovered.title: Classifier mismatch for technical briefs
new_gaps_discovered.description: Briefs containing data-attribute language (data-section-id, data-field-id, etc.) trigger the 'verification' classifier instead of 'planning'. Studio runs a Site Inspection instead of creating a build plan.
new_gaps_discovered.suggested_fix: Classifier prompt should prioritize explicit build intent keywords ('build', 'create', 'make', 'here is the brief') over technical attribute vocabulary. Alternatively, add explicit intent hints in the brief submission UI.

new_gaps_discovered.title: No CDN library management in Studio UI
new_gaps_discovered.description: Adding external libraries (Swiper.js, GSAP, Chart.js, etc.) requires direct HTML editing. Studio has no UI for managing CDN dependencies.
new_gaps_discovered.suggested_fix: Add 'Libraries' section in Settings tab with common library presets (Swiper, Alpine, GSAP, Chart.js) and a custom CDN URL field. Studio auto-injects selected CDN links into page <head>.

new_gaps_discovered.title: No component insertion from components library
new_gaps_discovered.description: The components/ library exists but there is no Studio UI to insert a saved component into an active page. Components are effectively write-only from Studio's perspective.
new_gaps_discovered.suggested_fix: Add 'Insert Component' action in Studio chat: 'insert product-card component' should inject the component HTML into the current page at the selected insertion point.

new_gaps_discovered.title: No decorative shape tools in Studio canvas
new_gaps_discovered.description: Starburst shapes, wavy SVG dividers, diagonal stripe patterns, and other visual decorators can only be added via direct code. Studio canvas has no 'insert shape' capability.
new_gaps_discovered.suggested_fix: Add visual decorator palette to Studio Design tab: starburst, wave-divider, stripe-bg, badge shapes. Each should be configurable (color, text, size) and insertable via drag-to-canvas.

new_gaps_discovered.title: Imagen 4 generates white-background images — no transparency
new_gaps_discovered.description: Character/mascot images generated by Imagen 4 always have white backgrounds. Transparent PNG output is not supported. This limits placement on dark or colored section backgrounds without CSS workarounds.
new_gaps_discovered.suggested_fix: Post-process generated character images with background removal (e.g., rembg library). Add --remove-bg flag to google-media-generate script. Or document mix-blend-mode CSS technique as workaround.

new_gaps_discovered.title: Studio preview server not auto-registered for new sites
new_gaps_discovered.description: After fam-hub creates a new site, its preview server must be manually added to .claude/launch.json. There is no auto-registration.
new_gaps_discovered.suggested_fix: fam-hub site new should automatically append a preview server entry to .claude/launch.json with the correct dist/ path and an autoPort flag.

components_created.name: product-card
components_created.description: Product card with image, condition badge, title, description, price, and optional Buddy-Pick badge that breaks top-right boundary

components_created.name: display-stage
components_created.description: Bold-framed deal showcase with swappable content slot — header, image, price, description, CTA, starburst corner badge, Buddy character breakout

components_created.name: starburst-badge
components_created.description: 12-point CSS starburst shape via clip-path polygon, configurable size/color/text

components_created.name: countdown-timer
components_created.description: Live countdown timer targeting Sunday 2pm, with Bangers-font digit blocks and inline JS

components_created.name: category-filter-pills
components_created.description: Horizontal filter pill row with JS filterCategory() function for showing/hiding product grid items by data-category

suggested_gui_additions: Cancel Build button — visible whenever buildInProgress = true
CDN Libraries panel in Settings tab — with presets and custom URL field
Insert Component from Library — chat command or canvas button
Shape/Decorator palette in Design tab — starburst, wave-divider, stripe-bg
Mascot Placement tool — drag Buddy pose from asset panel to canvas region
Background removal toggle on generated images in asset panel
Auto-register preview server in .claude/launch.json on fam-hub site new
Build timeout UI — shows 'Build is taking longer than expected' after 3min with a cancel option
